## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation updated (if user-facing behavior changed)
- [ ] `docs/` changes included (if architecture, API, governance, or deployment guidance changed)
- [ ] `python scripts/check_template_docs.py` passes (if docs or template guidance changed)
- [ ] `pytest` passes (if backend changed)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (if frontend changed)
- [ ] `cd e2e && npm test` passes (if E2E coverage changed or browser flows changed)
- [ ] Tested locally (backend and/or frontend as appropriate)
